phase-summary.outcome: Static verification completed and E2E test coverage was added for the floating chat widget + operation apply flow. Final browser E2E execution is currently blocked by an unrelated production build failure in existing engine dist import boundaries.

file.description: Added a dedicated Space Explorer chat-widget E2E test with mocked authoring API operations.
Recorded the build blocker preventing final Playwright verification on fresh production build output.

commands.command: pnpm --dir docs-site exec playwright test tests/e2e/play-route.spec.ts -g "floating authoring chat"

tests.test: Targeted Playwright: blocked because `next start` served stale build; fresh build currently fails in unrelated engine dist import path.

suggestion.gap: Release requirements do not currently include a blocker policy for unrelated build failures when validating a feature phase.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: feature-phase closure can be conditionally approved with documented blocker and scoped rollback plan if blocker is outside phase surface.

next.action: Resolve build blocker in engine dist import boundary, rerun targeted Playwright test, then close 50-12 and mark Phase 50 complete.
